text:
Perfect! I found and fixed the issue. The problem was that the batch token processing logic only checked for `transactionType === 'batch'`, but didn't include `'batch-bridge'`. This meant that batch bridge transactions weren't having their token amounts properly decoded and displayed.

The fix ensures that both `'batch'` and `'batch-bridge'` transaction types will have their batch tokens properly processed, which should resolve the "0.000000 ETH" display issue for batch bridge transactions.
